top_signals.title: Oil prices rise after report of Iranian attack on commercial ships in Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Brent and U.S. crude futures rose after a report of an Iranian attack on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Long-stalled maglev line finally gets green light from Shizuoka Prefecture
top_signals.summary: Environmental concerns had led to years of delays, but now that understanding has "steadily deepened," it is now possible to move forward, Shizuoka's governor said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump renews Greenland threats at NATO summit, says U.S. could remove troops from Europe
top_signals.summary: NATO fell into a crisis earlier this year as Trump demanded that the U.S. must take control of Greenland on national security grounds.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: World Cup in photos: Belgium beats U.S. 4-1 after Balogun controversy, Ronaldo exits
top_signals.summary: The U.S. is out of the World Cup, losing 4-1 to Belgium in the Round of 16 in a match blemished by suspension of Folarin Balogun's red card. Ronaldo exits.
